description_long: This cabinetry set consists of two main sections: an upper wall-mounted cabinet and a lower base cabinet with a countertop. The upper section features a large open shelf on the left and three vertical doors on the right, all finished in a light wood veneer. The lower section includes a black countertop with an integrated round sink on the right and two rectangular cutouts on the left, likely for appliances or additional sinks. Below the countertop, there are multiple storage compartments: three central drawers and several doors, all matching the upper cabinet's wood finish. The cabinetry is modern and minimalist, with flat surfaces and subtle vertical seams indicating door and drawer divisions. The overall design is functional and suitable for urban environments such as break rooms, garages, or public service areas.
description: A modern two-part cabinetry set with a light wood finish, featuring an upper wall cabinet with doors and an open shelf, and a lower base cabinet with a black countertop, integrated sink, drawers, and doors.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full cabinetry set, including the open shelf, doors, drawers, and the black countertop with sink cutout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of both upper and lower cabinets, and the position of the round sink cutout on the countertop.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the black countertop, sink cutout, and the arrangement of the upper cabinet above the base unit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wood panels and the alignment of the upper and lower cabinetry sections.
attribute_cabinet_type: base cabinet and wall cabinet set
attribute_door_configuration: multiple doors with open shelf and drawers
